from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class TreeNodeData:
    name: str
    is_leaf: bool
    children_count: int

def walk_tree(node):
    # Correct: always yield a uniform, predictable data structure from an iterator
    yield TreeNodeData(
        name=node.name,
        is_leaf=node.is_leaf,
        children_count=0 if node.is_leaf else len(node.children)
    )
